provenance_note: Scalar substrate reviewed and bound to the real Ascension client build 3.3.5a+patch-CZZ. Verified normalized fields (id, name, power_type, school_mask) derive solely from Spell.dbc; description is raw-only (reference). All side-table joins (cast/duration/range/icon) are deliberately un-adjudicated in E0: a plain FK-validity scan is ambiguous, so they ship raw_only/unproven with null index cells pending value-anchor disambiguation in M1.14E1. bound therefore byte-binds Spell.dbc (the only source of promoted values); side tables are existence-bound via required_tables.

id.evidence: spell id; M1.14A/B id anchor, unique across 208431 rows.

name.evidence: localized enUS name @136; normalized-exact match on 8 stock spells (Fireball 133, Frostbolt 116, Smite 585, Heroic Strike 78, Shadow Bolt 686, Wrath 5176, Arcane Explosion 1449, Eviscerate 2098) vs real client 3.3.5a+patch-CZZ.

power_type.evidence: confirmed @41 via 8 anchors incl. Heroic Strike(rage=1) and Eviscerate(energy=3); stock 3.3.5a @110 is wrong on this client.

school_mask.evidence: confirmed @225 via 7 single-school anchors (Physical=1,Holy=2,Fire=4,Nature=8,Frost=16,Shadow=32,Arcane=64); stock 3.3.5a @139 is wrong on this client.

description.evidence: tooltip text @170 confirmed on anchors (Fireball/Smite/etc.); tooltip macros ($s1) are unresolved templates, so interpretation is reference, not verified.

casting_time_index.evidence: recon-pending: FK column not uniquely resolvable by validity scan (>25 candidate columns fall in the side-table id range); awaits value-anchor joined-pair disambiguation (M1.14E1).

duration_index.evidence: recon-pending: FK column not uniquely resolvable by validity scan (>25 candidate columns fall in the side-table id range); awaits value-anchor joined-pair disambiguation (M1.14E1).

range_index.evidence: recon-pending: FK column not uniquely resolvable by validity scan (>25 candidate columns fall in the side-table id range); awaits value-anchor joined-pair disambiguation (M1.14E1).

spell_icon_id.evidence: FK into SpellIcon; @133 is the strongest single candidate (694 distinct values) but not uniquely provable by FK-validity alone; awaits joined-pair disambiguation (M1.14E1).

base_ms.evidence: base cast time in ms @1 (sample: id2=250, id3=500, id4=1000, id5=2000). side value cell position confirmed by sample rows on the real client; the JOIN from Spell is unproven until the index column is disambiguated (M1.14E1), so interpretation stays reference and the emitted value is raw_only.

base duration in ms @1. side value cell position confirmed by sample rows on the real client; the JOIN from Spell is unproven until the index column is disambiguated (M1.14E1), so interpretation stays reference and the emitted value is raw_only.

min_yd.evidence: min range (yards) @1 (sample rows show 0 for the min-hostile column). side value cell position confirmed by sample rows on the real client; the JOIN from Spell is unproven until the index column is disambiguated (M1.14E1), so interpretation stays reference and the emitted value is raw_only.

max_yd.evidence: max range (yards) @3 (sample: id2=5, id3=20, id4=30). side value cell position confirmed by sample rows on the real client; the JOIN from Spell is unproven until the index column is disambiguated (M1.14E1), so interpretation stays reference and the emitted value is raw_only.
